introSection: Crazy Mouse was a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster previously located at Dinosaur Beach and later at Steel Pier.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Crazy Mouse operated at Dinosaur Beach from 1997 to 1998. It reopened on Steel Pier in 1999. In 2017, the Crazy Mouse was relocated on the pier to accommodate Wheel. Crazy Mouse closed in 2021.

Crazy Crab opened in its place in 2025.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars have mouse faces on the front of them.

fullText:
Crazy Mouse was a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster previously located at Dinosaur Beach and later at Steel Pier.

Crazy Mouse operated at Dinosaur Beach from 1997 to 1998. It reopened on Steel Pier in 1999. In 2017, the Crazy Mouse was relocated on the pier to accommodate Wheel. Crazy Mouse closed in 2021.

Crazy Crab opened in its place in 2025.



The cars have mouse faces on the front of them.
